summary: Frontend-only testing completed for MVNO Manager with 2 new pages (Revendedores and Cobrancas). All 13 menu pages load correctly without black screens or JS errors. New features validated: Revendedores CRUD with discount, Cobrancas with Asaas sandbox status, Nova Cobranca and Em Lote dialogs.

issues: 'Maximum update depth exceeded' React warning appears during rapid navigation - does not affect functionality (known issue from previous iteration)
Missing `Description` or `aria-describedby` warning for DialogContent - accessibility improvement needed but not blocking

passed_tests: Login with admin@mvno.com/admin123 - redirects to Dashboard correctly
Dashboard (/) - Statistics cards load correctly (94 Clientes, 525 Chips, 20 Planos, 7 Ofertas)
Clientes (/clientes) - Page loads correctly
Planos (/planos) - Page loads correctly
Ofertas (/ofertas) - Page loads correctly
Chips (/chips) - Page loads correctly
Ativacoes (/ativacoes) - Page loads correctly with activation form
Linhas (/linhas) - Page loads correctly
Revendedores (/revendedores) - NEW PAGE loads correctly with testid
Revendedores: 'Novo Revendedor' button accessible and opens dialog
Revendedores: Create revendedor with name 'TEST_Revendedor Teste' and R$10 discount - SUCCESS
Revendedores: New revendedor appears in card with R$10.00 discount displayed
Revendedores: 'Vincular Chips' button visible on revendedor card
Carteira Movel (/carteira) - Page loads correctly
Cobrancas (/cobrancas) - NEW PAGE loads correctly with testid
Cobrancas: Asaas shows 'Conectado (sandbox)' status
Cobrancas: Summary cards visible (Receita R$0.00, Pendente R$39.99, Vencido R$0.00)
Cobrancas: Table with existing cobranca visible (PIX, R$39.99, Pendente)
Cobrancas: 'Nova Cobranca' button opens dialog with form
Cobrancas: 'Em Lote' button opens dialog with client selection
Assinaturas (/assinaturas) - Page loads correctly
Usuarios (/usuarios) - Page loads correctly
Logs (/logs) - Page loads correctly
All 13 navigation menu items accessible and functional
critical_code_review_comments: Both new pages (Revendedores.jsx and GestaoCobranças.jsx) have proper data-testid attributes for testing
Asaas integration shows 'Conectado (sandbox)' - API key is configured but blocked from preview container (CloudFront WAF 403)
Cobrancas are saved locally in MongoDB when Asaas API is blocked - will work on user's VPS
React 'Maximum update depth exceeded' warning persists during rapid navigation - should be investigated but doesn't affect functionality

success_rate.frontend: 100% (13/13 pages load correctly, all new features working)

seed_data_creation: Created TEST_Revendedor Teste with R$10 discount for testing purposes
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 13 pages validated including 2 new pages (Revendedores and Cobrancas). Asaas API is configured with sandbox key but blocked from preview container (CloudFront WAF 403). Cobrancas are saved locally in MongoDB. TEST_Revendedor Teste was created during testing and can be cleaned up. Navigation testids follow pattern: nav-{label.toLowerCase().replace(/ /g, '-')} e.g., nav-carteira-movel for 'Carteira Movel'.

mocked_apis_list: Asaas payment API (sandbox key configured but blocked from preview container - CloudFront WAF 403)

features_tested: Create revendedor with name and discount
Revendedor card displays with discount value
Cobranca em Lote form dialog with client selection
